title: bridge-jmap ignores JMAP session capabilities; cannot adapt to server limits
description: init_session() fetches the JMAP session and caches apiUrl, but ignores the entire capabilities object including maxObjectsInGet (limits email_get batch size), maxCallsInRequest, maxSizeUpload, etc. The bridge hardcodes limit:50 in email_query and sends all IDs in one email_get call. A server that advertises maxObjectsInGet < 50 will reject email_get with requestTooLarge; the bridge has no way to adapt without restarting with a lower config value. A contributor adding features (e.g. calendar bridging) will copy the same pattern and hit the same limitation.
